True only for commit statuses that prove the batch did not commit.

```ts
import { agenticMemoryFactCommitStatusIsTerminalFailure } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions";
```

```ts

```

| Parameter | Type | Description |

## Returns

Whether the batch is known not to have committed.
